---
id: list-conflicts
title: "List conflicts"
description: "List detected fact contradictions. Conflicts are created automatically when a new fact contradicts an existing fact with the same (entity, relation, scope) but a different value. See spec §5.9."
sidebar_label: "List conflicts"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api-reference/generated/stigmem-reference-node
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List conflicts"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/conflicts"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List detected fact contradictions. Conflicts are created automatically when a new fact contradicts an existing fact with the same (entity, relation, scope) but a different value. See spec §5.9.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
